hero.subtitle: 4 professional tools in one platform — viral UGC videos, brand creatives, cinematic niche content and AI dubbing. Same character, always consistent.
hero.socialProof: USED BY CREATORS IN PORTUGAL, BRAZIL AND ANGOLA

problem.subtitle: You have AI tools. You generate images. But your videos look robot-made, your character changes face every scene, and it takes hours to put it all together.
problem.p1_desc: Each generation creates a different face. Followers can't identify with anyone.
problem.p2_desc: Too perfect to look real. Platforms and users detect and ignore.
problem.p3_desc: You jump between 4-5 different tools. Hours wasted, mediocre result.

landing.quote: "The solution isn't more tools. It's the right tool."

features.f1_desc: Create short viral UGC videos up to 12s with native lip-sync, natural audio and perfect character consistency.
features.f2_desc: Upload a viral video, select your influencer and AI recreates everything — face, body, voice — with motion control up to 30s.
features.f3_desc: Cinematic videos by niche with Style Engine, consistent characters and category-optimized prompts.
features.f4_desc: Create your virtual influencer with fixed identity — same face, body and voice across all videos.
features.f5_desc: Create brand ads and presentations with UGC character and native lip-sync.
features.f6_desc: From theme to final video — script, narration, scenes and generation in one tool.

howItWorks.step1_desc: The Character Engine generates a unique virtual influencer — face, body, voice, all consistent.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Viral Pipeline, Dubbing, Dark Pipeline or Model Viral — each optimized for your goal.
howItWorks.step3_desc: AI generates videos with Seedance 1.5 Pro, Kling 3.0 or Wan 2.6 — native lip-sync, cinematic quality.

landing.socialProofQuote: "Finally a platform that understands UGC isn't about perfection — it's about consistent authenticity."
landing.socialProofSource: CONTENT CREATORS IN PORTUGAL, BRAZIL AND ANGOLA

pricing.subtitle: No contracts. Cancel anytime. 10 free credits to start.

faq.a1: 1 credit = 1 image. 12 credits = 1 viral video (Seedance). 30 credits = 1 dubbing (Kling). Plan credits renew monthly. Packs never expire.
faq.a2: Our exclusive system that keeps your virtual influencer visually consistent across all images and videos. Same face, same style, always.
faq.a3: That's not the goal. We use Seedance 1.5 Pro with prompts optimized for UGC aesthetics — shaky camera, skin texture, natural lighting. The result looks phone-filmed.
faq.a4: Upload a viral video, select your character, and Kling 3.0 Motion Control recreates the video with your virtual influencer's face, body and voice.
faq.a5: Yes. Cancel at any time. Access continues until the end of the paid period.
faq.q6: What's the difference between Starter and Pro?
faq.a6: Starter includes Viral Pipeline (Seedance). Pro adds Dubbing (Kling 3.0) and Dark Pipeline (Wan 2.6) — more credits and more tools.

ctaFinal.subtitle: 10 free credits. No credit card. Cancel anytime.

qa.caption: Instagram caption
qa.captionPrompt: Create an Instagram caption for a product launch post. Include a strong hook in the first line, relevant emojis, CTA, and 5 niche hashtags.
qa.reelsPrompt: Create a 15-second Reels script. Include a hook in the first 3 seconds, main content, and final CTA. Format: scene by scene with text and action.
qa.calendarPrompt: Create a 1-week Instagram content calendar (Monday to Friday). For each day: post type (carousel, reels, stories), theme, hook, and best posting time. Niche: digital marketing.
qa.storiesPrompt: Create a 5-Story Instagram sequence aimed at driving engagement. Include: poll, quiz, question box, and CTA to link in bio. Tone: casual and relatable.
qa.ugcPrompt: Create a 30-second UGC video script to promote a skincare product. Format: scene by scene with visual, audio, and on-screen text. Style: authentic, like a real review.
qa.ideasPrompt: Give me 10 Instagram content ideas for the digital marketing niche. For each idea: format (reels, carousel, post), hook, and unique angle. Focus on content that drives saves and shares.

prompts.title: Prompt Library
prompts.subtitle: Save and reuse your best prompts.
prompts.promptContent: Write your prompt... Use {variable} for dynamic parts
prompts.freeLimitPrompts: Free plan allows up to 3 saved prompts. Upgrade to save more.

starters.reels_content:
Create a Reels/TikTok script for a {duration}-second video about {topic}.

Style: {style}
Target audience: {audience}

Format scene by scene:
- HOOK (0-3s): What grabs attention
- CONTENT (3-{duration}s): Main value or story
- CTA (last 3s): What should viewers do

For each scene include:
- Visual: what appears on screen
- Audio: voiceover text
- Text overlay: on-screen text
starters.calendar_content:
Create a 1-week Instagram content calendar for a {niche} brand.

Monday to Friday, for each day provide:
- Post type (carousel, Reels, single image, Stories)
- Theme/topic
- Hook (first line)
- Best posting time
- Goal (awareness, engagement, conversion)

Mix content types for variety. Include at least 2 Reels and 1 carousel.
starters.ugc_content:
Create a UGC-style video script to promote {product}.

Duration: {duration} seconds
Platform: {platform}
Style: authentic, like a real customer review

Format scene by scene:
- SCENE 1: Hook + problem
- SCENE 2: Discovery of the product
- SCENE 3: Using the product (close-up)
- SCENE 4: Result + recommendation + CTA

For each scene: visual, audio (voiceover), and text on screen.
starters.stories_content:
Create a 5-Story Instagram sequence about {topic}.

Goal: {goal}
Tone: casual, relatable

For each Story:
- Type (text, photo, video, poll, quiz, question box)
- Visual description
- Text overlay
- Interactive element (sticker, poll, slider)

Story 5 must include CTA to link in bio or DM.
starters.ideas_content:
Give me 10 content ideas for {platform} in the {niche} niche.

For each idea:
- Format (Reels, carousel, post, Stories)
- Hook / first line
- Unique angle
- Expected engagement type (saves, shares, comments)

Focus on content that drives saves and shares. Mix educational, entertaining, and relatable content.
